description: An n-ary relation linking an organization to a project in a specific role.
title: Project Partner

@id.description: An Internationalized Resource Identifier (IRI). May be a full IRI or a compact IRI (CURIE) resolved by the JSON-LD context.

organization.description: The organization fulfilling this partner role.
organization.title: Organization

project.description: The project in which this partner participates.
project.title: Project

role.description: The role this partner plays in the project.
role.title: Role
